features.name: force statement with rwprobe-like reference type
features.description: Code should include a force statement that operates on a reference-probe type (rwprobe) derived from a signal, where the force resolution requires handling read-write probe operations

features.name: rwprobe operation creating reference to signal
features.description: Code should include a rwprobe operation that creates a read-write probe reference to a signal, used in force operations

features.name: ref.define linking rwprobe references across modules
features.description: Code should include a ref.define operation that connects an output rwprobe to an internal rwprobe, creating a reference chain across module boundaries
